_comment: Levers the agent may tune. Only fields read by runner.py are honored.
_hypothesis: Enabling prompt_caching=true will cache the system prompt across fixtures, cutting TTFT p95 below 760ms and total_ms p95 below 1130ms.
_system_prompt_versions: Defined in runner.py SYSTEM_PROMPTS dict. Add a new version there only if you must — but you can't edit runner.py, so prefer existing versions.
_tts_provider_note: elevenlabs free tier exhausted as of 2026-04 — quota_exceeded until next monthly reset. Use cartesia or deepgram for any new experiments. google requires GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON secret which is NOT set in CI — google experiments will fail with DefaultCredentialsError, do not waste invocations on them.
_tts_model_note_deepgram: For deepgram, tts_model is the voice/model name (same string as tts_voice_id) — runner reads voice_id, model field is informational.
_tts_voice_id_note: Voice ID per provider. ElevenLabs default 'Sarah' = EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL. Cartesia default (warm female US English) = 87286a8d-7ea7-4235-a41a-dd9fa6630feb. Deepgram default = aura-2-arcas-en (deepgram uses voice_id directly as the model name in the URL).
